title: [MTR3/4] Bombardier Innova APM 100
description: The Original Innova 100, in KTPA Livery
body:
The Bombardier Innovia APM 100 (Also known as Bombardier CX-100) resource pack contains the Tampa International Airport variant of the Bombardier CX-100. Originally developed by Dragon (Base Texture and the Modrinth upload), ExtremeMakerX (Modeling, Coding, & Texture Improvements), & Eric (Repaired the front lights in the blue one, Recorded the sounds while riding the SFO AirTrain, & Pictures of the Bombardier CX-100 interior IRL from SFO Airtrain).

**Rolling Stock:**

- The Bombardier CX-100

This project is not Affiliated with Tampa International Airport or the Hillsborough County Aviation Authority.
